title: myristica simiarum subsp. calcarea
intro: Myristica simiarum subsp. calcarea, a subspecies of the Myristica simiarum plant, is a type of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. It is a plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions. The extracts from this plant have been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to promote digestive health, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Myristica simiarum subsp. calcarea include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health issues.
